task_completion.description: Navigate to the Administration > Users section and initiate user creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR 'User / Groups' administration page or the 'Add User' form being opened.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct name (Jennifer Marie Smith) and credentials (NP)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the user form showing 'Jennifer' in First Name, 'Smith' in Last Name, 'Marie' in Middle Name, and 'NP' in Credentials/Suffix.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Federal Tax ID and NPI numbers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the user form showing Federal Tax ID '12-3456789' and NPI '1234567890'.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Authorized' and 'Active' checkboxes to grant provider status
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot clearly showing the checkbox for 'Authorized' (or 'Provider') is checked and the checkbox for 'Active' is checked.

task_completion.description: Save the new user and verify they appear in the user list
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the User List table showing a row for 'jsmith_np' or 'Smith, Jennifer' indicating the account was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenEMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenEMR web UI (browser window), not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered manually via the form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the form in a filled state before saving, rather than just the final list view.

integrity.description: Verify the process completed without blocking errors
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show red validation error banners or 'Access Denied' messages preventing the save.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Federal Tax ID is '12-3456789' and the expected NPI is '1234567890'. The 'Authorized' checkbox is critical for provider status.
